text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot Narita Taishin in front of the<n>academy gates,
but she seems a little<n>deflated.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've been getting through my races<n>fine, so what
are you complaining<n>about? I'm not some
weakling!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Shut it. I don't need you sticking your<n>nose in my
business!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(What's wrong with me? I'm so tired<n>and moody,
and I'm lashing out at<n>everyone.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Maybe I am feeling down... Ishould rest a little...)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We part ways, but Narita Taishin is in<n>low spirits
as she slinks off.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her exhaustion must be catching up<n>to her. Looks
like I need to rethink her<n>race schedule.
